Continuity Control / Task: Capture baseline latency, jitter, timeout, CPU, memory, and bandwidth for critical flows.
Safety or Operational Rationale: Performance thresholds must be engineering-approved before PQC/hybrid testing.

Continuity Control / Task: Identify protocol converters, VPN concentrators, firewall appliances, terminal servers, and embedded crypto.
Safety or Operational Rationale: Legacy devices may not support algorithm changes without firmware or replacement.

Continuity Control / Task: Create and rehearse rollback for certificates, firmware, gateway config, trust stores, and monitoring baselines.
Safety or Operational Rationale: Rollback must restore safe and stable operation.
